an4.3:1.0.2: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato paṇḍito viyatto sappuriso akkhataṁ anupahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati, anavajjo ca hoti ananuvajjo ca viññūnaṁ, bahuñca puññaṁ pasavati. Katamehi catūhi.
an4.3:1.0.3: Yo nindiyaṁ pasaṁsati,Taṁ vā nindati yo pasaṁsiyo;Vicināti mukhena so kaliṁ,Kalinā tena sukhaṁ na vindati.
an4.3:1.0.4: Appamatto ayaṁ kali,Yo akkhesu dhanaparājayo;Sabbassāpi sahāpi attanā,Ayameva mahantataro kali;Yo sugatesu manaṁ padosaye.
an4.3:1.0.5: Sataṁ sahassānaṁ nirabbudānaṁ,Chattiṁsatī pañca ca abbudāni;Yamariyagarahī nirayaṁ upeti,Vācaṁ manañca paṇidhāya pāpakan"ti.
